replies.msg:
人哋講明ban 你本土賽
彈出彈入你踢空氣？

對外國球迷嚟講，足球主要for娛樂，覺得所有野都係為錢

但對當地人特別英國呢啲傳統足球國家唔完全係咁，足球係有其他價值
傳統嚟講足球係代表勞工階層嘅運動，一個球會係代表一個城市/一個town去比賽，去團結同一個地方嘅人
同國內入面其他地區嘅"workers"代表競技切磋，贏到波就可以串下隔離埠，笑鳩隔離村
勁到去同歐洲其他地區比賽贏埋就再威啲

當然去到現代商業足球我唔知呢啲價值仲有幾多，但係對當地人嚟講依然重要

我知錢係唔會嫌多，但係搵少啲係唔使死嘅
你班老細搵幾多當地球迷都唔會有錢分，淨係知你班有錢佬圍威喂破壞緊足球競技

對外國球迷嚟講，足球主要for娛樂，覺得所有野都係為錢

但對當地人特別英國呢啲傳統足球國家唔完全係咁，足球係有其他價值
傳統嚟講足球係代表勞工階層嘅運動，一個球會係代表一個城市/一個town去比賽，去團結同一個地方嘅人
同國內入面其他地區嘅"workers"代表競技切磋，贏到波就可以串下隔離埠，笑鳩隔離村
勁到去同歐洲其他地區比賽贏埋就再威啲

當然去到現代商業足球我唔知呢啲價值仲有幾多，但係對當地人嚟講依然重要

我知錢係唔會嫌多，但係搵少啲係唔使死嘅
你班老細搵幾多當地球迷都唔會有錢分，淨係知你班有錢佬圍威喂破壞緊足球競技

反UEFA唔代表要撐呢壇野掛

人地冇話要退本地賽
係班FA冇錢分反枱踢走你炸
班FA咁陰濕都有人撐

傳統嚟講足球係代表勞工階層嘅運動，一個球會係代表一個城市/一個town去比賽，去團結同一個地方嘅人
同國內入面其他地區嘅"workers"代表競技切磋，贏到波就可以串下隔離埠，笑鳩隔離村
勁到去同歐洲其他地區比賽贏埋就再威啲

當然去到現代商業足球我唔知呢啲價值仲有幾多，但係對當地人嚟講依然重要

我知錢係唔會嫌多，但係搵少啲係唔使死嘅
你班老細搵幾多當地球迷都唔會有錢分，淨係知你班有錢佬圍威喂破壞緊足球競技

How Uefa's 'Swiss system' might work

First used in a Zurich chess tournament over a century ago, the 'Swiss system' has rarely featured in elite sport - but that could change if Uefa agrees a radical shake-up of the Champions League group stages.

The new system would see 32 or 36 teams placed in one league, each playing 10 games against teams seeded in four different pots. The top 16 teams would then advance to the knockout stages.

The format is yet to be agreed and finalised, but it is thought that the teams ranked from 17th to 24th would drop into the Europa League. Positions in the table may also affect seeding for the last-16, with the top-ranked side playing the team in 16th place, and so on.

https://www.theguardian.com/football/2021/apr/16/champions-league-new-36-team-format-set-for-uefa-approval-on-monday

The formation of the Super League comes at a time when the global pandemic has accelerated the instability in the existing European football economic model. Further, for a number of years, the Founding Clubs have had the objective of improving the quality and intensity of existing European competitions throughout each season, and of creating a format for top clubs and players to compete on a regular basis.

The pandemic has shown that a strategic vision and a sustainable commercial approach are required to enhance value and support for the benefit of the entire European football pyramid. In recent months extensive dialogue has taken place with football stakeholders regarding the future format of European competitions. The Founding Clubs believe the solutions proposed following these talks do not solve fundamental issues, including the need to provide higher-quality matches and additional financial resources for the overall football pyramid.

The new annual tournament will provide significantly greater economic growth and support for European football via a long-term commitment to uncapped solidarity payments which will grow in line with league revenues. These solidarity payments will be substantially higher than those generated by the current European competition and are expected to be in excess of €10 billion during the course of the initial commitment period of the Clubs.

In addition, the competition will be built on a sustainable financial foundation with all Founding Clubs signing up to a spending framework. In exchange for their commitment, Founding Clubs will receive an amount of €3.5 billion solely to support their infrastructure investment plans and to offset the impact of the COVID pandemic.

始終宜家呢個模式搞足球根本賺唔到錢
隊隊燒錢鬥高人工高價搶球員 唔夠搶成績越差收入又越低 又要玩均富分錢比弱球會

replies.msg:
NBA有draft先係重點，salary cap作用唔大
強隊可以正選屈機，後備求撚其
再唔係用爭冠機會吸引啲人（特別係老將）自願降薪過去
但係draft pick分分鐘幫到弱隊翻身，Chamberlain/Jordan/LBJ/Curry就係例子

依家愈強嘅球隊愈唔想擺資源落青訓度
結果啲用心搞青訓嘅球隊比強隊用錢搶哂啲核心球員
唔靠分錢同賣球員嘅話，根本就冇錢賺
傳統豪門淨係賣波衫同season ticket都已經好好賺，弱隊冇得咁玩

所以呢個新league只係為咗某啲球隊嘅利益而生，對歐洲足球嘅整體利益其實係冇幫助，甚至有害
